'''Yen-2''' was an asteroid/planetoid in the [[Verde system/Legends|Verde system]] of the [[Periphery/Legends|Periphery]]. It was an independently-owned [[Doonium/Legends|Doonium]] mining colony. It was serviced by [[Jatayus Outbound]] for within-region transport and [[Xizor Transport Systems/Legends|Xizor Transport Systems]] for out-of-region transport.
